name: Battle.net
description: Sign in to scan your full Battle.net game library. Uses Blizzard's private API (same as the desktop client) to fetch all owned games — both installed and unclaimed.
author: Diogo da Silva

access_token.label: Access Token (manual fallback)
access_token.description: Paste a Battle.net access token directly if OAuth is not configured. Get one from the Blizzard API or web session.
